creator: mono@FreeBSD.org
text:
The attached patch updates deskutils/tomboy and mail/gmime24 to the latest
version available.

While mono@ is not the maintainer of mail/gmime24, this port was created in
order to provide mail/gmime24-sharp (slave port) in the ports tree, which is a
dependency of deskutils/tomboy.

No other port depend on mail/gmime24:
http://www.freshports.org/search.php?stype=depends_all&method=match&query=mail/gmime24
